opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: I can't walk to the kitchen without getting winded, and I have to prop myself up with extra pillows just to sleep.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: My breathing at night has been getting worse and worse over the last couple of weeks and I'm exhausted all the time — my wife made me call because I can't lie flat anymore.

symptom_narrative.onset: crept up gradually over the last 3 to 4 months, then got a lot worse in the last two weeks
symptom_narrative.duration: months, acutely worse over about two weeks
symptom_narrative.character: get puffed and worn out with any effort; feels like I just can't catch my breath
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: bad enough that I can't walk to the kitchen without stopping to get my breath, and I'm wiped out doing simple things
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: in my chest and my breathing generally
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: much worse lying down at night; a bit better when I sit up
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: sitting upright and propping myself up on three pillows
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: lying flat, and walking even a short distance
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: I wake up with a bit of a cough some nights, and my ankles look a bit puffy by the evening. No chest pain and my heart isn't racing or fluttering.
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: nothing like this before — I've always been able to get around fine
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: struggling with basic day-to-day things now; the breathlessness stops me doing normal chores

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: I've never been told I have a heart or lung problem

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives with spouse, who is worried about how quickly his stamina has dropped off and that he can't lie flat

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-reported, single value; no recent trend recorded

objective_data_offered.value: my ankles look a bit puffy and swollen by the end of the day
I feel a bit short of breath even sitting still and I think I'm breathing faster than usual
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient's own description with no measuring device

objective_data_offered.value: has to sleep sitting up on three pillows or he can't breathe
spouse says he looks tired and drained and is breathing a bit fast, but settles when sitting upright
